requirement_topic.en: CE Marking — Multi-Directive Framework for Air-source Heat Pumps in Norway (EEA)
requirement_topic.zh: CE标志——挪威（欧洲经济区）空气源热泵的多指令框架
requirement_topic.zht: CE標誌——挪威（歐洲經濟區）空氣源熱泵的多指令框架

summary.en: Air-source heat pumps placed on the Norwegian market require CE marking. Norway is an EEA member and has incorporated all relevant New Approach directives into national law. The same multi-directive framework as for the EU applies: (1) Low Voltage Directive 2014/35/EU for electrical safety; (2) EMC Directive 2014/30/EU for electromagnetic compatibility; (3) Ecodesign Regulation (EU) 2016/2281 (not CE marking per se, but blocking market placement for non-compliant products); (4) Pressure Equipment Directive 2014/68/EU for refrigerant pressure circuits where thresholds are met; (5) F-gas Regulation (EU) 2024/573 (applicable via EEA, overseen by Miljødirektoratet). A single Declaration of Conformity must cover all applicable directives. Norwegian-language technical documentation is required for consumer products. DSB is the Norwegian competent authority for product safety and market surveillance.
summary.zh: 投放挪威市场的空气源热泵须取得CE标志。挪威是欧洲经济区成员国，已将所有相关新方法指令纳入国家法律。适用与欧盟相同的多指令框架：（1）低压指令2014/35/EU（电气安全）；（2）电磁兼容指令2014/30/EU（电磁兼容性）；（3）生态设计法规（EU）2016/2281（非CE标志本身，但不合规产品禁止市场投放）；（4）压力设备指令2014/68/EU（当制冷剂压力回路满足阈值时适用）；（5）氟化气体法规（EU）2024/573（通过欧洲经济区适用，由Miljødirektoratet监管）。单一符合性声明须涵盖所有适用指令。消费品须提供挪威语技术文件。DSB是负责产品安全和市场监督的挪威主管机构。
summary.zht: 投放挪威市場的空氣源熱泵須取得CE標誌。挪威是歐洲經濟區成員國，已將所有相關新方法指令納入國家法律。適用與歐盟相同的多指令框架：（1）低壓指令2014/35/EU（電氣安全）；（2）電磁相容指令2014/30/EU（電磁相容性）；（3）生態設計法規（EU）2016/2281（非CE標誌本身，但不合規產品禁止市場投放）；（4）壓力設備指令2014/68/EU（當制冷劑壓力迴路滿足閾值時適用）；（5）氟化氣體法規（EU）2024/573（通過歐洲經濟區適用，由Miljødirektoratet監管）。單一符合性聲明須涵蓋所有適用指令。消費品須提供挪威語技術文件。DSB是負責產品安全和市場監督的挪威主管機構。

summary.en: CCC (China Compulsory Certification), administered by CNCA, covers safety and EMC for domestic appliances in China. CCC does not have an Ecodesign equivalent, an F-gas refrigerant restriction equivalent, or a pressure equipment category/Notified Body system equivalent to PED. The CCC mark is not recognised in Norway or any EEA country and cannot substitute CE marking.
summary.zh: 由中国国家认证认可监督管理委员会（CNCA）管理的中国强制性产品认证（CCC）涵盖中国国内家用电器的安全和电磁兼容。CCC没有等同于生态设计要求的制度，没有等同于氟化气体制冷剂限制的制度，也没有等同于PED压力设备类别/公告机构体系的制度。CCC标志在挪威或任何欧洲经济区国家均不被认可，不能替代CE标志。
summary.zht: 由中國國家認證認可監督管理委員會（CNCA）管理的中國強制性產品認證（CCC）涵蓋中國國內家用電器的安全和電磁相容。CCC沒有等同於生態設計要求的制度，沒有等同於氟化氣體制冷劑限制的制度，也沒有等同於PED壓力設備類別/公告機構體系的制度。CCC標誌在挪威或任何歐洲經濟區國家均不被認可，不能替代CE標誌。

gap.en: CCC certification does not substitute CE marking for the Norwegian market. Separate conformity assessment under each applicable directive is required. The multi-directive nature of heat pump CE marking (LVD + EMC + Ecodesign + PED) means that a Chinese manufacturer must address each directive independently, compile a Technical File, and issue a Declaration of Conformity before the first unit is shipped to Norway. Norwegian-language documentation is additionally required for consumer products sold in Norway.
gap.zh: CCC认证不能替代挪威市场所需的CE标志。需针对每项适用指令进行独立的合规评估。热泵CE标志的多指令性质（低压指令+EMC指令+生态设计+PED）意味着中国制造商须独立处理每项指令，编制技术文件，并在首批产品发运挪威前出具符合性声明。在挪威销售的消费品还须提供挪威语文件。
gap.zht: CCC認證不能替代挪威市場所需的CE標誌。需針對每項適用指令進行獨立的合規評估。熱泵CE標誌的多指令性質（低壓指令+EMC指令+生態設計+PED）意味著中國製造商須獨立處理每項指令，編制技術文件，並在首批產品發運挪威前出具符合性聲明。在挪威銷售的消費品還須提供挪威語文件。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory (CE marking required for Norwegian market via EEA; Norwegian-language docs required for consumer products; DSB market surveillance)
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory (CCC required for domestic market; not equivalent to CE)

source.publisher: DSB — Direktoratet for samfunnssikkerhet og beredskap

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Major gap — CCC certification does not substitute CE marking for Norway; separate conformity assessment under each applicable directive (LVD, EMC, Ecodesign, PED) required; F-gas compliance also mandatory via EEA; Norwegian-language documentation additionally required.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 重大差距——CCC认证不能替代挪威所需的CE标志；需针对每项适用指令（低压指令、EMC指令、生态设计、PED）进行独立的合规评估；氟化气体合规同样通过欧洲经济区为强制要求；此外还须提供挪威语文件。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 重大差距——CCC認證不能替代挪威所需的CE標誌；需針對每項適用指令（低壓指令、EMC指令、生態設計、PED）進行獨立的合規評估；氟化氣體合規同樣通過歐洲經濟區為強制要求；此外還須提供挪威語文件。

requirement_topic.en: Norwegian Market Surveillance — DSB and Post-market Obligations
requirement_topic.zh: 挪威市场监督——DSB及售后义务
requirement_topic.zht: 挪威市場監督——DSB及售後義務

summary.en: DSB (Direktoratet for samfunnssikkerhet og beredskap — Norwegian Directorate for Civil Protection) is the primary Norwegian authority responsible for market surveillance of electrical and pressure equipment, and for enforcement of CE marking requirements under EEA-incorporated directives. Importers and distributors placing CE-marked heat pumps on the Norwegian market bear post-market obligations: maintaining Technical Files for 10 years, cooperation with DSB on product recalls or corrections, and registering non-conforming products with DSB when identified. For PED Category II+ systems, the EU/EEA Notified Body identification number must appear on the CE marking declaration.
summary.zh: DSB（挪威民事保护和应急计划管理局）是负责电气和压力设备市场监督以及执行欧洲经济区所纳入指令下CE标志要求的挪威主管机构。在挪威市场投放CE标志热泵的进口商和经销商须履行售后义务：保存技术文件10年、配合DSB进行产品召回或整改，以及在发现不合规产品时向DSB进行登记。对于PED第II类及以上系统，欧盟/欧洲经济区公告机构标识号须出现在CE标志声明中。
summary.zht: DSB（挪威民事保護和應急計畫管理局）是負責電氣和壓力設備市場監督以及執行歐洲經濟區所納入指令下CE標誌要求的挪威主管機構。在挪威市場投放CE標誌熱泵的進口商和經銷商須履行售後義務：保存技術文件10年、配合DSB進行產品召回或整改，以及在發現不合規產品時向DSB進行登記。對於PED第II類及以上系統，歐盟/歐洲經濟區公告機構標識號須出現在CE標誌聲明中。

standards_or_laws: Directive 2014/68/EU (PED) Articles 14-17 (Notified Body requirements — applicable via EEA)
Norwegian EEA implementation (produktforskriften / DSB enforcement mandate)

summary.en: For pressure vessels requiring registration in China, a designated special equipment inspection body (特种设备检验机构) issues an inspection certificate under the SAMR/SELO framework. The Chinese inspection certificate and SELO registration are not recognised as equivalent to EU/EEA Notified Body certification or EC Type Examination under PED. Post-market obligations in China differ in scope and enforcement mechanism from the DSB/EEA regime.
summary.zh: 对于中国境内须进行注册的压力容器，经国家市监总局/特检院认定的特种设备检验机构颁发检验证书。中国检验证书和SELO注册与欧盟/欧洲经济区公告机构认证或PED下的EC型式检验不等效。中国的售后义务在范围和执法机制上与DSB/欧洲经济区制度不同。
summary.zht: 對於中國境內須進行登記的壓力容器，經國家市監總局/特檢院認定的特種設備檢驗機構頒發檢驗證書。中國檢驗證書和SELO登記與歐盟/歐洲經濟區公告機構認證或PED下的EC型式檢驗不等效。中國的售後義務在範圍和執法機制上與DSB/歐洲經濟區制度不同。

standards_or_laws: Special Equipment Safety Law of the PRC (2013)

gap.en: Chinese SELO inspection certificates are not recognised as equivalent to EU/EEA Notified Body involvement under PED. For PED Category II+ heat pump systems intended for Norway, a EU/EEA Notified Body must be engaged and its identification number included on the CE declaration. DSB's post-market surveillance regime in Norway imposes ongoing importer obligations not paralleled in the Chinese domestic market framework.
gap.zh: 中国特检院检验证书与欧盟/欧洲经济区PED下的公告机构参与不等效。对于拟进入挪威的PED第II类及以上热泵系统，须引入欧盟/欧洲经济区公告机构并在CE声明中包含其标识号。DSB在挪威的售后市场监督制度对进口商施加了中国国内市场框架中不存在的持续义务。
gap.zht: 中國特檢院檢驗證書與歐盟/歐洲經濟區PED下的公告機構參與不等效。對於擬進入挪威的PED第II類及以上熱泵系統，須引入歐盟/歐洲經濟區公告機構並在CE聲明中包含其標識號。DSB在挪威的售後市場監督制度對進口商施加了中國國內市場框架中不存在的持續義務。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory for PED Category II and above (Notified Body involvement required via EEA; DSB market surveillance ongoing)
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory for applicable pressure vessels (designated inspection body under SAMR/SELO)

source.publisher: DSB — Direktoratet for samfunnssikkerhet og beredskap

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Major gap — Chinese SELO inspection certificates not recognised under PED as applicable in Norway via EEA; EU/EEA Notified Body required for PED Category II+ systems; DSB post-market surveillance imposes ongoing importer obligations.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 重大差距——中国特检院检验证书不被挪威通过欧洲经济区适用的PED所认可；PED第II类及以上系统须引入欧盟/欧洲经济区公告机构；DSB售后市场监督对进口商施加持续义务。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 重大差距——中國特檢院檢驗證書不被挪威通過歐洲經濟區適用的PED所認可；PED第II類及以上系統須引入歐盟/歐洲經濟區公告機構；DSB售後市場監督對進口商施加持續義務。
